name: Alberich Holderhek

sheet.name: Alberich Holderhek
sheet.background_story:
The more I continue to travel these Forsaken Lands the more people call me by the name Wagon. 
While I continue to reassure them I am not, it has led me to look into what they had been doing. It seems they were a member of the Darkblade Guild who ended up battling alongside those fighting for Mother Agora during the Battle of the Church and losing their life.

description:
